meaning: n.(被憎恨或蔑视的人的)肖像,雕像
examples: In Paraguay, people create an effigy and dress him up like a scarecrow when the new year comes.
To get rid of these bad things, every family lights an effigy on fire at midnight.
The use of a mask on an effigy has long roots as part of Guy Fawkes Night celebrations.
The parade includes the ritual burning of an effigy of King Momo, a bad spirit.
Suggestions that the effigy was also wrapped in an EU flag have been denied.
